mapper.select:
SELECT r.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
r.JOB_TYPE_CD AS jobTypeCd, r.DESK_NO AS deskNo, r.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, TO_CHAR(r.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, r.WINDOW_AREA AS windowArea, r.MULTI_TASK AS multiTask, r.RMK AS rmk, r.RECEPTION_TYPE AS receptionType, r.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_RECEPTION r JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = r.STAFF_ID WHERE r.STAFF_ID = #{staffId}

SELECT r.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
r.JOB_TYPE_CD AS jobTypeCd, r.DESK_NO AS deskNo, r.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, TO_CHAR(r.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, r.WINDOW_AREA AS windowArea, r.MULTI_TASK AS multiTask, r.RMK AS rmk, r.RECEPTION_TYPE AS receptionType, r.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_RECEPTION r JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = r.STAFF_ID

SELECT r.STAFF_ID AS staffId, e.DEPT_ID AS deptId, e.NAME AS name, e.PHONE AS phone, e.EMAIL AS email, e.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, e.GENDER_CODE AS genderCode, e.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, e.ADDRESS1 AS address1, e.ADDRESS2 AS address2, e.STATUS AS status,
r.JOB_TYPE_CD AS jobTypeCd, r.DESK_NO AS deskNo, r.SHIFT_TYPE AS shiftType, TO_CHAR(r.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, r.WINDOW_AREA AS windowArea, r.MULTI_TASK AS multiTask, r.RMK AS rmk, r.RECEPTION_TYPE AS receptionType, r.EXT_NO AS extNo FROM JCH.EMPLOYEE_RECEPTION r JOIN JCH.EMPLOYEE e ON e.STAFF_ID = r.STAFF_ID
e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
r.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
r.SHIFT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
r.JOB_TYPE_CD LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
r.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
r.RECEPTION_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.STAFF_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR e.DEPT_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.SHIFT_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.JOB_TYPE_CD LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.RECEPTION_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR r.EXT_NO LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY r.STAFF_ID DESC
